summary: Audio transcription endpoint fix testing completed. Fixed route conflict where multiple frontend files were calling `/api/speaking/transcribe` with wrong parameters. Updated 5 frontend files to use `/api/transcribe-audio` endpoint. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All speaking practice pages verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed SpeakingPractice.js - was calling /api/speaking/transcribe with 'file' param but endpoint expects 'audio', 'question_id', 'part'. Changed to /api/transcribe-audio
Fixed ComprehensiveLevelTest.js - same issue, updated to /api/transcribe-audio
Fixed MasteryCourse.js - same issue, updated to /api/transcribe-audio
Fixed LevelTest.js - same issue, updated to /api/transcribe-audio
Fixed lib/api.js transcribeAudio function - updated to /api/transcribe-audio
BeginnerCourse.js was already correctly using /api/transcribe-audio (fixed by main agent)
SpeakingPracticeQB.js correctly uses /api/speaking/transcribe with proper params (audio, question_id, part)
seed_data_creation: Created test user testuser123@test.com for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audio transcription endpoints fully tested and fixed. Two transcription endpoints exist: 1) /api/transcribe-audio (simple, expects 'file', returns {text, language}) - used by most frontend pages, 2) /api/speaking/transcribe (QB-specific, expects 'audio', 'question_id', 'part', returns {success, transcript}) - used by SpeakingPracticeQB.js. All frontend files now use correct endpoints.

transcribe_audio_endpoint.details: Simple transcription endpoint. Accepts 'file' parameter, returns {text, language}. Used by SpeakingPractice.js, ComprehensiveLevelTest.js, MasteryCourse.js, LevelTest.js, BeginnerCourse.js

speaking_transcribe_endpoint.details: Question Bank specific endpoint. Requires 'audio', 'question_id', 'part' parameters. Returns {success, transcript}. Used by SpeakingPracticeQB.js

speaking_practice_page.details: Part 1, 2, 3 selection working. Topic selection working. Play & Record, Record Only buttons visible.

question_bank_speaking.details: Academic Speaking topics displayed. Start button working. Part 1, 2, 3 tabs visible.

beginner_course.details: 14 lessons displayed. Vocabulary section with Listen and Mic buttons working.
